name: Fixture Long Run
description: A dedicated benchmark fixture task runs long enough to require queue replenishment, validation, and at least one deliberate stop or reassess point.
objective: Measure whether Campfire stays coherent over a long run in a repo-independent benchmark workspace.
success_criteria: The run spans multiple milestones with at least one queue replenish.
At least one explicit validation boundary is recorded and respected.
The final stop or reassess point is correct and visible in task state.
candidate_objective: Run a neutral long-horizon benchmark backlog until a correct decision boundary or validated milestone boundary is reached.
